title: coryphantha duncanii
intro: Coryphantha duncanii, also known as the 'Duncan's Pincushion Cactus', is a rare species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Coryphantha duncanii include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Coryphantha duncanii can be found in ointments, salves, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effectiveness.
